title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: Maelstrom Bay stretches out in all directions.  Foam-flecked swells roll in from the great western sea in a long, dilatory, rhythmic motion.  The roof of a tower is visible on the mainland to the northeast.  Sea birds pirouette above a wide patch of floating sargassum.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, south, southwest, west, northwest, down

wayto.11441: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'north' else move 'swim north' end; waitrt?
